name: sales-sheet-builder
description: Build or tune compressed, differentiated, source-backed B2B sales sheets with separate internal research workbooks.

interface.shortDescription: Create compressed buyer-facing sales sheets with a separate research workbook.
interface.longDescription: Turn a company, offer, product, service, URL, pasted text, prior draft, or feedback notes into a differentiated B2B sales sheet using JTBD, status quo analysis, alternative mapping, and source-backed evidence while keeping the buyer-facing copy short.
defaultPrompt: Build a compressed sales sheet from this URL.
Create a buyer-facing sales sheet and separate workbook.
Tune this sales sheet using my feedback notes.
